task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the product 'Premium Garden Care' with the correct search key.
task_completion.visual_evidence: iDempiere Product window showing a saved record with Search Key 'SVC-GARDEN-001' and Name 'Premium Garden Care'.

task_completion.description: Verify the product is configured with the correct type, UOM, and tax category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Product window for 'Premium Garden Care', the Product Type dropdown is set to 'Service', UOM is set to 'Each', and Tax Category is set to 'Standard'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a 'Monthly Care Plan' subscription type with a monthly frequency.
task_completion.visual_evidence: iDempiere Subscription Type window showing a saved record with Name 'Monthly Care Plan' and Frequency set to Monthly (or equivalent 1-month interval setting).

task_completion.description: Verify the registration of the subscription named 'C&W HQ Maintenance 2025' for the correct business partner.
task_completion.visual_evidence: iDempiere Subscription window showing a saved record with Name 'C&W HQ Maintenance 2025' and Business Partner set to 'C&W Construction'.

task_completion.description: Verify the subscription is linked to the newly created product and subscription type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Subscription window for 'C&W HQ Maintenance 2025', the Product field displays 'Premium Garden Care' (or 'SVC-GARDEN-001') and the Subscription Type field displays 'Monthly Care Plan'.

task_completion.description: Verify the subscription start, paid-until, and renewal dates are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Subscription window, the Start Date is '01/01/2025', the Paid Until date is '01/01/2025', and the Renewal Date is '02/01/2025'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the iDempiere web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the standard iDempiere web GUI in a browser, not terminal commands, database queries, or API testing tools.

integrity.description: Verify the records were actually saved in the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI shows indicators of saved records (e.g., status bar messages, absence of unsaved changes asterisks, or active record navigation buttons) rather than just typed text in an unsaved form.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't mock the expected output in a text editor or fake HTML page.
integrity.visual_evidence: The surrounding UI elements (menus, toolbars, tabs, workspace layout) consistently match the standard iDempiere ERP interface across all screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Business Partner 'C&W Construction' is a verified standard entity in the iDempiere GardenWorld demo database. All other values (SVC-GARDEN-001, Premium Garden Care, Monthly Care Plan, C&W HQ Maintenance 2025, and the 2025 dates) are task-specific synthetic data.
